{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Mon Keth
| aliases = Keth
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Keth]] is the head of the [[Mon family]] and an [[Iron stage]] artist.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Keth]] is the head of the [[Mon family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Keth]] is a member of the [[Mon family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Keth]] was sentenced to isolation training for one month.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Wei Mon Keth will be in isolation training for the next month,” the First Elder mentioned.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
